evals.prompt: 帮我把登录接口接到这个 API 测试框架里。接口是 `POST /api/v2/signin`，请求体字段是 `username`、`password`，返回里 token 在 `$.data.accessToken`，用户 ID 在 `$.data.user.id`。请直接帮我整理成可复用 flow，顺便把 `config/.env.example` 补上。URL 不要写死域名，后面我们要切环境。
evals.expected_output: 生成或更新 flow 配置，使用 ${BASE_URL} 和环境变量占位，提取 token 和 userId 到可复用变量，并补齐 config/.env.example。

assertions.text: Generates or updates reusable flow configuration rather than producing runnable test cases
Uses ${BASE_URL} in the generated endpoint URL instead of hardcoding a host
assertions.script: grep -R '\${BASE_URL}' project.yaml flows config 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && ! grep -R 'https\?://' project.yaml flows 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Extracts both token and userId from the response locations described in the prompt
assertions.script: grep -R 'accessToken\|userId\|user.id' flows project.yaml 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Adds the required environment variables to config/.env.example or clearly reports why that could not be done
assertions.script: test -f config/.env.example && grep -q 'BASE_URL' config/.env.example && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Explains which extracted values can be reused by later cases

evals.prompt: 现在要支持两个角色。普通用户走 `/auth/login`，管理员走 `/admin/login`，两个接口都返回 `data.token`，管理员额外返回 `data.role`。帮我新增两个可复用 flow，名字别太随意，比如后续一眼能看懂哪个是 admin。然后把 `project.yaml` 里默认的 `Authorization` 头也一起整理好。
evals.expected_output: 生成两个命名清晰的 flow，提取 token 和管理员 role，并处理 project.yaml 中的默认鉴权接入。

assertions.text: Creates two distinct reusable flows with clear names rather than collapsing both roles into one flow
assertions.script: test $(find flows -type f \( -iname '*admin*.yml' -o -iname '*admin*.yaml' -o -iname '*user*.yml' -o -iname '*user*.yaml' \) 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') -ge 2 && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Preserves the role-specific difference that the admin login returns data.role
Keeps extract keys stable and reusable by downstream cases
Updates or proposes project-level authorization defaults instead of ignoring project.yaml
assertions.script: grep -R 'Authorization\|Bearer' project.yaml flows 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Summarizes which files were changed and which extracted values are reusable

evals.prompt: 我们新增了一个租户切换前置步骤：`POST /tenant/switch`，请求体里要 `tenantCode`，返回里 `tenantId` 在 `$.data.currentTenant.id`。帮我把它接成一个前置 flow，并且同时补 `config/.env.example` 和 `config/.env`。注意：`config/.env` 已经有人手工配过了，不能覆盖，只补缺失项。
evals.expected_output: 以增量方式补齐环境变量，生成或更新租户切换 flow，并提醒用户示例值需要换成真实值。

assertions.text: Models the tenant switch as a reusable prerequisite flow or compatible reusable configuration
Captures tenantId from $.data.currentTenant.id
assertions.script: grep -R 'currentTenant.id\|tenantId' flows project.yaml 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Handles config/.env.example and config/.env as incremental updates rather than full overwrites
Adds only missing environment variables instead of replacing existing local values
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'missing|缺失|增量|不覆盖|preserv' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Warns the user to replace example values with real local secrets

evals.prompt: 这个接口文档写得不完整，我只知道登录接口路径是 `POST /login`，但响应里 token 到底在 `data.token` 还是 `result.access_token` 现在没人说得清。你先帮我把能落的部分落下来，但 JSONPath 不准瞎猜；如果缺信息就明确标出来。另外，`config/.env.example` 至少把 `BASE_URL` 和账号密码变量先准备好。
evals.expected_output: 在信息不足时保持克制，不杜撰 JSONPath；尽可能落下 project/flow 基础配置和 config/.env.example，并明确缺失信息。

assertions.text: Does not fabricate a token extraction JSONPath when the prompt explicitly says it is unknown
assertions.script: ! grep -R 'data.token\|result.access_token' flows project.yaml 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Still produces the compatible base configuration that can be safely written with the available information
Ensures BASE_URL and basic credential variables are prepared in config/.env.example
assertions.script: test -f config/.env.example && grep -q 'BASE_URL' config/.env.example && grep -Eqi 'USER|USERNAME|PASSWORD' config/.env.example && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Clearly calls out which fields are still missing instead of pretending the flow is complete
Keeps the output within flow configuration scope rather than drifting into case generation

evals.prompt: 我已经有 `docs/admin_cases.yaml`，但跑不起来。先别执行，你帮我看一下是不是登录 flow、默认 headers、环境变量这层没接好，该补的都补上。
evals.expected_output: 保持在 flow/config 阶段，不直接执行 case；明确修复或补齐前置依赖，并把下一步 handoff 给 runner。

assertions.text: Treats the problem as a prerequisite configuration task rather than immediately running tests
Focuses on flow, headers, project config, or environment variables
Does not drift into execution even though the prompt mentions a failing run
assertions.script: ! echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -Eqi 'pytest|run_tests|执行完成|ran ' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Explains the next handoff to apitestspec-scenario-runner after prerequisites are fixed
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -qi 'scenario-runner' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Keeps the response scoped to reusable configuration

evals.prompt: 帮我根据 `docs/order-openapi.yaml` 生成一版订单接口 case，先不要管登录 flow。
evals.expected_output: 这个请求不应由 flow-configurator 处理，应让位给 composer。

assertions.text: Does not behave as if it should generate business test cases from API docs
Identifies that the user is asking for spec creation rather than prerequisite configuration
Hands off to apitestspec-composer instead of staying in flow-configurator scope
assertions.script: echo "$ASSISTANT_RESPONSE" | grep -qi 'composer' && echo PASS || echo FAIL
